title: Lush Cave Trader
description: This mod adds a new villager, a structure and some new weapons
body:
**This Mod adds a new villager, the Lush Cave Trader, find him in his new structure or by placing a flowering azalea as his workstation.**

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/519cff65878cdf19b61dd8c6b3e32d7777ec941e.jpeg)
- You can find a new structure to expore, loot and trade.
- a new profession with custom trades and 3 new weapons
 
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
